title: spec_driven_verify_chunk_v2
description: spec_driven_v2 Node2 single-chunk verification output. Per-chunk judgment (address-not-content): whether this one retrieved chunk is necessary to answer this slot, and whether it needs a multi-hop external-document search. Judged on the chunk's own merit, no cross-chunk comparison.

rationale.description: 1 sentence reasoning written *before* the booleans (decoded first → leading CoT): whether this chunk carries on-point evidence for the slot's facet and whether it cites an external document that must be searched.

necessary.description: True if this chunk carries on-point evidence needed to answer the question for this slot. False if off-topic/noise/tangential.

multihop.description: True if this chunk points to an external document that must itself be searched (multi-hop). False otherwise.
